mapper.sql: id, user_no, client_ip, client_agent, request_url, request_description, request_data, request_time, response_url, response_result, reponse_data, reponse_time, create_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.action_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.action_log (id, user_no, client_ip, client_agent, request_url, request_description, request_data, request_time, response_url, response_result, reponse_data, reponse_time, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{requestData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{responseUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{responseResult,jdbcType=BIT}, #{reponseData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{reponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into dbo.action_log
id,
user_no,
client_ip,
client_agent,
request_url,
request_description,
request_data,
request_time,
response_url,
response_result,
reponse_data,
reponse_time,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{clientIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{clientAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{requestUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{requestDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{requestData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{responseUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{responseResult,jdbcType=BIT},
#{reponseData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{reponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update dbo.action_log
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_ip = #{record.clientIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_agent = #{record.clientAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_url = #{record.requestUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_description = #{record.requestDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
request_data = #{record.requestData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
request_time = #{record.requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
response_url = #{record.responseUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
response_result = #{record.responseResult,jdbcType=BIT},
reponse_data = #{record.reponseData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
reponse_time = #{record.reponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.action_log set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, client_ip = #{record.clientIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, client_agent = #{record.clientAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_url = #{record.requestUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_description = #{record.requestDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, request_data = #{record.requestData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, request_time = #{record.requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, response_url = #{record.responseUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, response_result = #{record.responseResult,jdbcType=BIT}, reponse_data = #{record.reponseData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, reponse_time = #{record.reponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo.action_log
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_ip = #{clientIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_agent = #{clientAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_url = #{requestUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_description = #{requestDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
request_data = #{requestData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
request_time = #{requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
response_url = #{responseUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
response_result = #{responseResult,jdbcType=BIT},
reponse_data = #{reponseData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
reponse_time = #{reponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.action_log set user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, client_ip = #{clientIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, client_agent = #{clientAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_url = #{requestUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_description = #{requestDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, request_data = #{requestData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, request_time = #{requestTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, response_url = #{responseUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, response_result = #{responseResult,jdbcType=BIT}, reponse_data = #{reponseData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, reponse_time = #{reponseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
